name: XYZ-Hyper Dragon Cannon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＸＹＺ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エックスワイゼット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ハイパー・ドラゴン・キャノン
name_jp_rom: Ekkusu Wai Zetto - Haipā Doragon Kyanon
desc:
"X-Cross Cannon" + "Y-Yare Head" + "Z-Zillion Tank"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards from your field and/or GY. Once per opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 card, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can banish this card from your field or GY and reveal 1 Level 8 LIGHT Machine Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck; Special Summon up to 3 of the Fusion Materials mentioned on it from your GY and/or banishment.

action: Reveals your Extra Deck for cost
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires only specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
Banishes itself from field for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
